---
name: New Agent Request
about: Suggest a new specialist agent for the collection
title: "[Agent] "
labels: new-agent
assignees: ''
---

## Agent Overview

**Agent Name:** (e.g., "GraphQL Architect")
**Category:** (e.g., engineering, marketing, finance, sales)
**One-line description:**

## Use Case

What specific problem does this agent solve? What are the concrete tasks it would own?

## Why it belongs here

- What makes this a distinct specialist (vs. a variant of an existing agent)?
- Who is the target user for this agent?

## Suggested tools / context

List any tools, frameworks, or platforms this agent should have deep expertise in.

## Checklist (if you plan to submit a PR)

- [ ] I've checked that no similar agent already exists in the collection
- [ ] I have real use cases to validate this agent's behavior
- [ ] I'm willing to write and test the agent file
